title: A man wearing glasses and a leather jacket sits on a park bench. Rose, Ethan's grown-up daughter, approaches him.

name: Nathan Dempsey
title: A man wearing glasses and a leather jacket sits on a park bench. Rose, Ethan's grown-up daughter, approaches him.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose looks at him in surprise.

name: Nathan Dempsey
title: Rose looks at him in surprise.

name: Nathan Dempsey
title: They go into his lab.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: They go into his lab.

name: Nathan Dempsey
title: He points to a voluminous container with a red mushroom inside.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: He points to a voluminous container with a red mushroom inside.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She brings her hand to the container. The mushrooms inside it begin to glow. Rose plunges into the ocean, which is an allegory for the depths of her consciousness. She hears the voices of people she knows. She floats past the windows behind which the figures stand.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She covers her ears with her hands. The voices keep coming from all directions. Rose sinks deeper and deeper, to the point she can no longer stand the voices.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She comes to her senses sitting on a chair in the lab.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The lab seems a little different. The light is dimmer.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose opens the door from the lab and sees…that everything around her is infested with fungus.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She continues down the corridors, and the walls are covered with a dark red goop that drips disgustingly from them.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: From behind a closed cell door, she hears a girl's voice.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose goes on in search of the key. She sees an altar on which her name is written in blood, and a candelabra falls on the altar.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: In a closet nearby she manages to find the key, but she stepped in some red goop.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She notices the goop.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The goop's leaking out.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Some goop drips down from the ceiling.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She goes to the cell and opens the door. There is no one inside except a puddle of red goop. There is a child's drawing on the floor and Rose picks it up.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The drawing shows three girls being attacked by something large and black. While she is looking at the drawing, a hand appears out of the red goop and grabs Rose's leg.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The goop swallows Rose but someone reaches out and pulls her out.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The girl who rescued her looks like Rose's twin sister, but she has ashy hair. She has black clothes and acts like a real goth, so I'll call her Black Rose.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose follows her unexpected companion.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose helps her push back the corpse, which hides a crack in the stone wall. Black Rose crawls into the crack.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She follows her. They make their way to the back of the dungeon, lit by many candles. In one of the dungeons, Rose sees another self trying to get out of the goop.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She approaches Black Rose trying to use the switch.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The cries and moans of her doppelgangers can be heard from everywhere in the different cells. Black Rose disappears somewhere, and Rose has to look for her. Sometimes she discovers her own corpses.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: When she enters one of the small rooms, she is attacked by a barely living double with a twisted face. In disgust and horror, Rose tosses her aside and the doppelganger dies.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She takes the handle out of the broken switch lying in the back room, then tries to find her way back. She hears a scream.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She dies.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The monster runs to Rose.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She falls to the floor and covers her face with her hand, which emits sparks of white light. The sparks throw the monster away, but they don't kill it. Rose can't do the trick again. She runs to the switch and inserts the handle she found.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The door, for some reason, doesn't open right away. Rose has to run from the monster.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Finally, the door opens and Rose runs on, but behind the door there are also many monsters.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She runs into a round room with a bas-relief of antique soldiers with bows.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The monsters have already caught up with her and are slowly approaching the trapped prey.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She presses against a wall that suddenly disappears.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose continues to run following the directions of the white sparks that form into words.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose manages to escape the monsters and enter the house itself. It turns out to be Dimitrescu's Castle. Rose climbs out of the fireplace and into the living room. She sits on the floor, trying to process the horror she has experienced.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose follows the advice and begins to search the house. She finds the corpse of another doppelganger lying on the floor.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Several monsters devour it, turning it into a goop.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: He snaps his fingers.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She has to escape again. She finds her way out of the castle.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: However, the iron gate slams shut right in front of her.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She runs up the stairs on which the words appear.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: She finds a relatively safe place.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose kills her pursuer and hears the Duke's voice coming from above.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: Rose reads the description.

name: Rosemary Winters
title: The door further is chained.

name: Rosemary Winters

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: A nurse runs into the office.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He starts a chainsaw hidden under his coat and rams the blade into the nurse. She dies horribly in a fountain of blood. Zombie-Doctor turns his attention to Leon, but Leon, being a trained fighter, quickly increases the distance by kicking a chair and then dodging the chainsaw.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He blocks the chainsaw with his axe and kills the zombie with a shot from his powerful pistol. The chainsaw continues spinning on the floor. He picks it up.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He mows down approaching zombies with the chainsaw, creating a veritable bloodbath. He impales some, splattering everything around with blood.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He saws through the thick bolt of a door lock with the chainsaw, breaking it in the process. Afterwards, he contacts the coordinator.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: And then Leon approaches the metal grate... just at the moment Grace crawls out from there!

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: We see the scene of Grace being dragged into the darkness again, but now it has a continuation—Leon shoots the horrific creature right in the head.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace runs towards Leon as he shoots the creature, now standing up, in the head again... and several more times, turning its head into a bowl of bloody mush with a dangling eye. Grace, holding her head in her hands, tries to calm down.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Grace runs towards Leon as he shoots the creature, now standing up, in the head again... and several more times, turning its head into a bowl of bloody mush with a dangling eye. Grace, holding her head in her hands, tries to calm down.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Someone presses a button, and the grate slams shut, separating the heroes—Grace is now closer to the exit, and Leon remains inside. Not only the doors but also the windows are blocked. Complete lockdown.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Someone presses a button, and the grate slams shut, separating the heroes—Grace is now closer to the exit, and Leon remains inside. Not only the doors but also the windows are blocked. Complete lockdown.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Leon hands her a gun. And not just any gun, but his own massive cannon.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon hands her a gun. And not just any gun, but his own massive cannon.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Grace takes the pistol, holding it with both hands.

name: Victor Gideon
title: The door between them closes, plunging the corridor into complete darkness. Leon pulls out a flashlight and looks around, realizing that just a few meters away from him stood Victor, now wearing a hooded robe resembling snakeskin.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: The door between them closes, plunging the corridor into complete darkness. Leon pulls out a flashlight and looks around, realizing that just a few meters away from him stood Victor, now wearing a hooded robe resembling snakeskin.

name: Victor Gideon
title: Leon attacks him hand-to-hand, but Victor grabs him by the throat with lightning-fast reflexes.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He examines Leon with his helmet.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Despite his resistance, Leon loses consciousness.

name: Victor Gideon
title: Despite his resistance, Leon loses consciousness.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Naturally, Grace’s first attempt is to get out through the main entrance, but she needs to collect three rhombus-shaped keys, symbolizing the words Moon, Sun, and Star.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace enters the next room, above which a red lamp glows. Turning on the light, she notices a corpse in the corner... but it doesn’t scare her as much as before. In the far part of the room, she sees a glass prison holding a little girl.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: The girl’s hair is the same silver as Grace’s. She is reading a book and is slightly surprised by the stranger’s arrival. The corpse in the room doesn’t seem to bother her at all. This is because the book is written in Braille.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She gets up from the bed and falls to the floor.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She examines the girl.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace scans the room, noticing another glass prison.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She turns to the girl.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: The doctor is very rude and serious.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: The doctor dies. Grace picks up his card from the floor.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace emerges into a dining hall. A long table in the center of the room is piled with food and corpses. And sitting on this table, on all fours, is a zombie, devouring it all. The tablecloth is stained with blood, saliva, and juices. Grace finally finds a suitable pistol for herself, a B934, and hastily leaves the horrific room.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She manages to find a few bullets, which she promptly unloads into a zombie that attacks her, then finishes it off with a knife made from half of a pair of scissors. By a fortunate twist of circumstances, someone had already tried to kill this zombie with a knife, so she extracts this useful item from its body. She finds a few more bullets, and now she has the means to defend herself. She approaches a door leading to some kind of basement, which is secured with a valve lock, but when she tries to turn the large red valve, it simply falls off its mounting, becoming useless.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: When Grace kills another zombie, something interesting happens—part of the human consciousness remains, and the zombie, though unintelligibly, utters the following:

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Opening the safe, Grace obtains the Moon Quartz! She immediately wants to place it in its designated spot to save inventory space.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She uses the found ruby to access the gaming hall.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She finds the East Wing Keycard after searching a hand... just a severed hand, lying under a bed.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: And then the Zombie Chef comes for her! Grace needs to run. Along the way, she even manages to kill the Zombie Singer. And on the bar counter lies another gun—an S&S M232.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She exits into the central corridor and opens the East Wing. Afterwards, she returns again to the blind girl...

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She goes to the East Wing and finds the medical/surgical department. There, she manages to find a syringe that kills infected cells. She tests it on a nearby zombie doctor, and its head simply explodes.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: ...and shoots it in the head. A bit further, in a laboratory, Grace finds a rather interesting device that allows her to collect blood from the infected, enabling its study and processing into various useful items.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace decides to eliminate the threat posed by the fatso, Chunk, and injects him with the infected cell destroyer while he moves through the corridors, but nothing happens.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She receives a dose of lead medicine from Grace, after which our heroine descends into the basement. An excavator comes towards her, crashing through a wall.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She shoots the driver, and the excavator stops, blocking half the corridor.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She crawls under the excavator.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She takes antique coins from the safe, using them to purchase several upgrades. Then she encounters a strange zombie...

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace kills a whole brigade of doctors turned into zombies, then finds a bottle of concentrated acid in a back room.

name: Victor Gideon
title: On her way, Grace examines an office where she encounters... Victor. She immediately aims her gun at him.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace continues to stammer, which tells us she is frightened.

name: Victor Gideon
title: Grace continues to stammer, which tells us she is frightened.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: He steps closer and literally towers over Grace. The gun pointed at him does not bother him in the slightest.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He steps closer and literally towers over Grace. The gun pointed at him does not bother him in the slightest.

name: Victor Gideon
title: A beep comes from the transmitter.

name: Victor Gideon
title: We see a certain man lying on a cot in an isolation ward, infected, his face covered with a rag. Blood begins to seep from a wound on his arms, and the man breathes slowly and heavily.

name: Victor Gideon
title: Frightened, Grace flees the office and wedges a chair under the door handle. This does not stop Victor, and he lunges after her. Grace hides behind a bedside table.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: He leaves, and Grace carefully emerges from her hiding place.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: In the dead doctor’s office, Grace finds a diary containing a clue for the third key.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: However, the images on the buttons have long since worn off.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Examining the buttons, Grace realizes they have hints marked in Braille.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace remembers that the girl is secured behind a third-level lock, and on the doctor’s wrist, there is also a third-level access key.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She hesitates, wanting to remove the bracelet from the corpse.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Having removed the bracelet, she puts it in her pocket and looks at the safe.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She returns to the blind girl. Approaching the door, she still hesitates to unlock it immediately, remembering the warning.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace unlocks the door and enters.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She takes Emily in her arms and runs with her.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Now Grace must watch over Emily, but while she carries her, her actions are limited.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She manages to reach the doctor’s office in the isolation ward without much trouble.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She puts Emily on the floor and guides her.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Meanwhile, terrible sounds come from the ward...

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Having finished off the zombies, Grace runs to Emily.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She hands her the last symbol.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: But before she can take the symbols from her hands, the wall explodes with a mighty crash, and everything around plunges into blackness. Grace frantically searches for her flashlight... It turns out that the giant monster recently killed by Leon has burst into the room, but it seems the monster’s head has gradually regenerated. The creature grabs the blind Emily and drags her away.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She gives chase. But to follow the monster, she must descend into the pitch-black darkness of the basement. She hesitates. Fear pins her to the ground.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She carefully descends into the black hole.

name: Victor Gideon
title: We switch to Leon. He is tied to a chair, and a spotlight shines in his face. Victor approaches.

name: Victor Gideon
title: Leon simply turns away.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He picks up a scalpel.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He picks up a scalpel.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He runs his hand through his hair.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He pulls back the collar of his shirt, exposing the black veins.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He pulls back the collar of his shirt, exposing the black veins.

name: Victor Gideon
title: Victor examines Leon with his helmet.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He makes an incision on Leon’s neck, right next to the black veins.

name: Victor Gideon
title: While he speaks, Leon carefully cuts his bindings with a secret knife.

name: Victor Gideon
title: Having cut the bindings, Leon kicks Victor against the wall with a powerful blow, then strikes his helmet with his foot. Leon notices a gun lying nearby and lunges for it while Victor is stunned, but Leon himself feels weak. Taking advantage of this, Victor flees. He manages to escape the attic and pulls the ladder up after him, managing to utter one last phrase into the narrowing opening.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon immediately calls the coordinator.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon injects some kind of substance into his neck and feels relief.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He checks the remaining bullets in his gun.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He turns on his flashlight and heads into the adjacent corridor.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon brings down the fatso with a few shots and embeds his axe in its head.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: After several minutes of running through tight spaces and fighting, Leon inflicts enough damage that Chunk withers and explodes, splattering entrails everywhere.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Dishwasher’s Note

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He encounters the Zombie Chef.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He finds Victor’s office. Inside lies a heap of corpses on the couch by the coffee table and on the floor. Everything is splattered with blood.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He is attacked by a big-headed zombie.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: When he activates a secret lever, several zombies burst into the room.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He finds a hidden elevator and descends in it.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: We switch to the female coordinator herself, sitting at a computer.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: The coordinator reads a document on the screen, and we are shown who has been helping Leon all this time. And yes, we know her.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: The coordinator reads a document on the screen, and we are shown who has been helping Leon all this time. And yes, we know her.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: She scrolls through documents and comes across one that is heavily redacted. Only a few words are visible.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: A photo of Grace Ashcroft appears.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: We switch to Grace, who has landed rather ungracefully on the ground and is frantically searching for the flashlight that fell out during her fall. Having looked around and found no enemies, she exhales.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Soon, Grace emerges into concrete corridors and from there into a security room where monitor screens are located. Seeing Emily sitting in a cell on the monitor, Grace sighs.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace continues to explore the dark concrete corridors, only weakly lit by red lamps. She finds cells where zombies are kept, or perhaps where people were kept who simply turned into zombies. Finally, she finds the cell holding Emily, but from inside come some terrible sounds. Carefully approaching and peering in, Grace notices that the tall monster is inside the cell. The monster quickly crawls away through a ventilation shaft in the ceiling. Without wasting a moment, Grace runs to the cell door. Emily seems to be asleep.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace gently rattles the cell door to get Emily’s attention without attracting the monster’s. Emily comes to.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: However, the girl just turns over on her other side and continues sleeping. Grace examines the cell and sees a huge number of severed doll heads, which, apparently, the monster brought.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Unlocking the Cells

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Security Guard’s Report

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace finds a room with corpses wrapped in black plastic suspended from a conveyor on the ceiling. She has to move the conveyor to proceed further. Some of the zombies are still capable of movement.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She has to descend into a pool where zombies were drowned. The liquid, half consisting of blood and other bodily fluids, she had previously drained...

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: The pool turns out not to be a pool at all, but a corpse disposal machine.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: In the far part of the pool, massive blades activate, and the pool floor moves like a conveyor belt towards these blades. Some of the zombies are capable of movement, and Grace has to defend herself while pondering what to do next.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She retrieves a fuse located at the other end of the pool.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She has to slide down a pipe filled with rotting water, blood, and bodily fluids, and finally plunge into a vat of such water.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She quickly runs to the panel and activates it using the three fuses. Lights come on, and all the cells open. Grace runs to Emily.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Emily starts to struggle, not understanding who is in front of her.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She hugs Emily.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She takes Emily in her arms and runs towards the opened elevator.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Zombies that have been freed from their cells are everywhere.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She rushes into the elevator.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She tries to move the pallet of bags blocking the door. At that moment, the giant monster appears.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: At the last second, she presses the button, and the elevator slowly ascends.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: It’s the giant creature—it’s crawling on the outside. The elevator stops, and Grace tries to pry the doors open to get out on the floor where the elevator has halted. She succeeds. First, she lifts Emily up.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She helps her out of the elevator, but as she climbs out herself, the creature grabs her leg and tries to pull her back into the elevator. At this moment, the elevator cable begins to snap under the weight.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: And then the elevator falls! Grace screams—whether from pain or fear, we don’t know yet. The camera slowly pans down to her feet, and we hold our breath, waiting for her leg to be severed by the elevator... but the elevator only cuts off the creature’s arm. Grace collapses onto the tiled floor with relief. Emily crawls over to her.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She holds out the quartz cube with the star symbol on it.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Emily hugs her. A little taken aback, Grace decides to hug Emily back.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She stands up heavily and takes Emily in her arms.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She walks towards the main entrance (located nearby) to finally leave this cursed place.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She inserts the last quartz cube into the door and steps outside.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She has become somewhat lethargic, as if drained of strength. Grace walks towards the helipad, where a helicopter is standing, next to which is a pilot with an injured leg.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: He steps closer.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: He slaps his leg.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She puts Emily in the helicopter.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She seats Emily, who immediately lies down to sleep.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She seats Emily and fastens her seatbelt.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She enters a meeting room. Besides the wines and expensive furniture, a collection of medical bone saws is also striking.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace dismantles a wine bottle, finds a secret key, and uses it on a panel in the center. The entire room begins to descend, as if it were an elevator.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She enters a spacious room with many capsules filled with red liquid. Some of them contain human beings.

name: Victor Gideon
title: She finds the helicopter key on a desk in an office by the computers and enters a nearby room, where she accidentally stumbles upon Victor. He doesn’t notice her, and she hides behind a capsule.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He hangs up the phone and takes a briefcase from the table.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: He laughs triumphantly and quickly leaves the office. The wail of a siren sounds.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Equipment begins to break down; tubes rip from their sockets, flooding everything with red liquid. Everything sparks and shakes.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace runs to the "elevator" she came down on but finds only a huge hole.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She needs to find another exit quickly—she arms herself with something like a fire extinguisher that makes zombies explode when used and charges ahead.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: A massive tanker explodes, and Grace is nearly swept away by a wave of red sludge.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She runs with all her might through the flooding corridors.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She finds a staircase, climbs up it to the surface, and emerges outside.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She runs towards the helicopter, which is already being besieged by zombies. Harry is preparing for takeoff.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace moves to the rear of the helicopter and sits down next to Emily.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: The helicopter rotor slowly spins up...

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Zombies swarm the helicopter. One tries to smash the windshield with its head.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Despite Grace’s efforts, they crash into the roof of a church and land in a cemetery, a fitting place given how dangerous their landing was. Grace sighs with relief, turns to Harry... and he is impaled by a branch. Grace screams.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: We return to Leon, still standing in Victor’s secret office.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He looks out the window and sees the helicopter crash! He scans the room and notices a bolt-action sniper rifle standing by the table.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: He smashes the window with the stock and sees through the sniper scope Grace climbing out of the wreckage. Grace reaches Emily, opening the dented helicopter door with her bare hands.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She unbuckles and carries the girl out, then notices a horde of zombies heading towards them. They are already at the cemetery gates!

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon also sees the whole situation.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He jumps out of the window onto a roof and calls Sherry, his coordinator.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: He jumps out of the window onto a roof and calls Sherry, his coordinator.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He steps onto a balcony, a better vantage point for firing, and provides cover for Grace as she carries Emily. Grace tries to shoulder-open the church door.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He kills zombies one by one with precise shots.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Having taken out the last one, he slides across the roof and heads towards Grace, who is now inside the church. He lands on a zombie, crushing its head with his boot.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Leon reaches the church, now engulfed in flames. Emily is in very bad shape, lying on the floor, with Grace, fighting back tears, leaning over her.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She tries to press her hands against the wound on the girl’s chest.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: She tries to press her hands against the wound on the girl’s chest.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He takes Emily in his arms. Zombies slowly surround the church.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: With two precise shots, he kills an approaching zombie.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: A slow but very dangerous zombie, pulsating with pus-filled growths, enters the church. It roars ferociously from a huge, toothy maw.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: A bloody battle begins in the burning church. Leon picks up a fire axe and uses it to cleave through zombie heads.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace runs across the earthen floor of the dirty basement. Emily moans softly in pain.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: They end up in the sanatorium’s sewers but later climb higher.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: They find themselves in a gigantic warehouse. Grace spots The Girl crawling nearby.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She lays her down on a stack of iron grates.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: As she leaves, she closes a metal roll-up door behind her to keep others out. Now she needs to deal with The Girl. She opens a hatch on the warehouse roof, but the process stops.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She goes down lower, but The Girl is already there. After the first switch, it grabs Grace by the head and throws her to the floor.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Now The Girl is very close. Grace chooses not to confront it directly, as she lacks the firepower to fight such a creature. She distracts it by throwing empty bottles and using her flashlight, allowing her to reach the switches.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: The last switch refuses to turn!

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Now, with light everywhere, The Girl’s eyes hurt, and it runs away.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: However, The Girl finds a way to reach her. It slowly walks towards its prey.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She presses a button, and the hatch on the ceiling slowly opens, flooding the entire space with light.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Due to the abundance of sunlight, The Girl begins to smoke. Grace shoots it in the head several times, and it screams madly in pain, melting from within. It turns into a heap of rotten, oozing flesh.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She runs to Emily...

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: ...but the girl seems dead.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: No pulse can be felt at her wrist.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She tries to perform CPR, counting the rhythm out loud.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: She continues CPR, also breathing air into her mouth. Gradually, she loses control of her emotions.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace’s hands slow to a stop. She begins to cry and sinks to the floor.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: And then Emily’s hand twitches.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: However, the girl begins to scream piercingly, as if a demon has possessed her. She falls to the floor and writhes in convulsions. Afterwards... she mutates. Grace watches the process in horror, on the verge of a nervous breakdown. She slowly crawls backward, towards the door. Emily transforms into a shapeless leech with a claw. With this claw, she smashes everything around.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: The creature notices Grace and lunges at her, but Leon runs up and fires several shots, driving the monster away from Grace.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: She hangs on Leon’s arm, the one holding the gun.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: We switch to Leon—our task is to finish off the creature. Leon doesn’t hesitate and pulls the trigger, despite Grace’s pleas.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: The creature falls and dies.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: In tears, she crawls towards the shapeless beast.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: In tears, she crawls towards the shapeless beast.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace throws Leon’s huge pistol, which she has been carrying all this time, at his feet.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Grace throws Leon’s huge pistol, which she has been carrying all this time, at his feet.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Grace slowly walks away. Leon wants to bend down for his gun but falls to one knee and vomits blood. With a habitual motion, he wipes the blood from his mouth. Grace walks on, staring at the floor, not even noticing Victor standing nearby.

name: Victor Gideon
title: Grace slowly walks away. Leon wants to bend down for his gun but falls to one knee and vomits blood. With a habitual motion, he wipes the blood from his mouth. Grace walks on, staring at the floor, not even noticing Victor standing nearby.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He presses a button that raises a massive metal door right in front of Grace. It leads outside.

name: Grace Ashcroft
title: Beyond the door, a middle-aged man in dark sunglasses with slicked-back silver hair awaits her. He wears a white lab coat and a leather cloak draped over his shoulders. Black veins are visible on the man’s face. He smokes a cigarette, wearing leather gloves.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: A helicopter flies towards them, and we switch to Sherry. She swallows some oxycodone hydrochloride (a strong painkiller) and looks at herself in the mirror, then removes a glove from her hand, on which black veins are also visible. Inhaling, she returns to work.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Meanwhile, Leon is driving in his car.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: Meanwhile, Leon is driving in his car.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon heads straight for Raccoon City! The city greets him with dust and abandoned buildings.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: Leon heads straight for Raccoon City! The city greets him with dust and abandoned buildings.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Entering the city, Leon stops and gets out of the car.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: Entering the city, Leon stops and gets out of the car.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon walks through the dusty ghost town, gun at the ready.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: Leon walks through the dusty ghost town, gun at the ready.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon continues searching for the way to the epicenter of the blast. He accidentally steps on a human skull, and it awakens memories... at this time, a spider-like monster watches him from a rooftop. It descends silently like Shelob from The Lord of the Rings—incidentally, the monster’s size is comparable to hers.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: The spider tries to attack Leon with a leg, but he dodges and strikes the leg with his axe.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He runs from the spider and hides in a building. The spider cannot follow him and, in its attempts to squeeze through, collapses the ceiling, blocking the passage. Now Leon is trapped in the building and needs to find a way out. Meanwhile, the spider searches for a way to get inside... and it succeeds very quickly. It chases Leon down a long corridor and smashes through a wall with a kick of its leg. Leon climbs to the floor above, where he must fight the spider.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon pulls out his shotgun and shoots the spider right in the face, then notices growths on its rear and concentrates fire on them. The spider, not expecting such resistance, flees.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: The battle continues, and finally the spider tires of it all and pins Leon against the wall, trying to devour him. Leon grabs his axe and starts striking the spider’s chitinous head-plate. They crash through several floors under the creature’s immense weight, and there Leon delivers the final blow with his axe straight into its toothy maw.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He finds himself in a subway tunnel and quickly emerges onto the surface, arriving at massive iron gates leading to the city center.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He looks at the bomb on the gate.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: He looks at the bomb on the gate.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Orders for the Engineer Corps

name: Sherry Birkin
title: Orders for the Engineer Corps

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon boots up a military laptop sitting on a table.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: Leon boots up a military laptop sitting on a table.

name: Victor Gideon
title: He doesn’t know that someone is watching him through a specially configured camera on the laptop—and it’s Victor, currently flying in a helicopter with a personal pilot, Grace, and the man in glasses.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Meanwhile, Leon continues to explore the surroundings. He enters a massive warehouse.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: In answer to his question, several dry zombies attack him. He defeats them and approaches a crane to clear a path.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He emerges onto a roof.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: He emerges onto a roof.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He surveys the warehouse roof.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: He surveys the warehouse roof.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Leon scans the surrounding rooftops with binoculars.

name: Sherry Birkin
title: Leon scans the surrounding rooftops with binoculars.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: The last soldier is killed by Zeno. In his hands is a rather large revolver. The recording ends.

name: Grace Ashcroft

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He runs, hides behind a car, but the blast still throws him a considerable distance. Mr. X jumps down to Leon. The arena is engulfed in flames, and there’s nowhere to run. And Mr. X has another missile... he even seems to be smiling.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He shoots the missile, and it explodes. Mr. X merely mutates slightly and loses his clothes. The fight begins! Mr. X hurls cars, and Leon doesn’t spare his arsenal against such a monster. He even manages to embed his axe in its chest.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: A pulsating, pus-filled sore opens on Mr. X’s chest. Leon baits it into striking the ground and dodges. Mr. X’s mutated hand gets stuck in the ground, allowing Leon to shoot the weak point.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: A fountain of blood erupts from Mr. X’s chest, its ribs crack inward, and it dies, falling to the ground.

Leon coughs.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: Suddenly, a giant hand grips the platform. Victor, transformed into a monster the size of four stories, climbs onto the platform and clings on with tentacles to avoid falling off. Describing its form is absolutely impossible—the creature is abstract and extremely grotesque. But I’ll venture to guess it’s a giant bloody crab!

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: A truly bloody battle begins. The creature is literally a mass of meat with weak spots. Leon shoots at them, then climbs onto the monster, wielding his axe and covering himself in tens of liters of blood. The creature, once Victor, slams the ceiling in rage. Soon, it has no strength left to fight Leon. He blows off its limbs one by one, then aims at a huge, exposed bloody eye.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: He fires. The creature explodes in a fountain of blood, and Leon, spinning his pistol on his finger, holsters it. Meanwhile, the ceiling threatens to collapse. Leon returns to searching for Grace.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
title: After a tense minute, a bright searchlight switches on somewhere above. Soldiers in unusual sand-colored uniforms with black cloaks descend into the room. Their faces are covered by balaclavas, and night vision devices cover their eyes.

name: Leon Scott Kennedy
